name: unfold
description: Hierarchical plans as markdown files — AI-generated, git-native, human-readable

chatParticipants.name: unfold
chatParticipants.description: Generate, convert, and refine hierarchical plans

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new plan from a description

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert an existing plan to Unfold format

commands.name: refine
commands.description: Refine or expand an existing plan

enumDescriptions: Literal execution — only what you explicitly ask for. Minimal hierarchy, no embellishment. Best for enterprise/structured work.
Follows your request closely but suggests things you might have missed (setup, testing, config). Stays focused — won't go on tangents.
Moderate decomposition with 3-4 levels of detail. The default experience.
Deep exploration mode — suggests alternatives, edge cases, and considerations you didn't mention. Best for brainstorming.
unfold.guidanceLevel.description: Controls how much the plan generator elaborates beyond your request.

unfold.askBeforeGenerating.description: Ask clarifying questions before generating or refining a plan.

enumDescriptions: Brief summaries — 1-2 sentences per step. Focus on what and why, not how.
Standard detail — 2-3 sentences per step with key points covered.
Detailed steps — 3-5 sentences with specific approaches, considerations, and examples.
Comprehensive — highly detailed with code snippets, file paths, edge cases, and full implementation guidance.
unfold.stepDetailLevel.description: Controls how much detail each step in the plan contains (independent of overall plan breadth).

languageModelTools.name: unfold_getProjectStructure
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List files and directories at a given path in the workspace. Returns a file tree useful for understanding project layout.

path.description: Relative path from workspace root. Defaults to root.

depth.description: Maximum depth to traverse. Defaults to 2.

languageModelTools.name: unfold_readFile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the contents of a file in the workspace. Useful for examining source code, configuration, or documentation.

maxLines.description: Maximum number of lines to return. Defaults to 200.

languageModelTools.name: unfold_searchCode
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for text patterns across workspace files. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers.

pattern.description: Text pattern to search for (case-insensitive substring match).

fileGlob.description: Glob pattern to filter files. Defaults to all files.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. Defaults to 20.

languageModelTools.name: unfold_getDependencies
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Extract dependency information from project manifest files (package.json, requirements.txt, Cargo.toml, etc.).

scripts.compile:full: node ./esbuild.mjs && cd webview-ui && npm run build
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && cd webview-ui && npm run build
